title: Name resolution issue with WITHOUT ROWID
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
CREATE TABLE t2(x String, y Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY x;
SELECT t2.x FROM t2 JOIN t1 ON t1.a = 1;
key_bug_features: Joining WITHOUT ROWID table as second causes error
